heading: Lease of land acquired for park, parkway, or playground purposes
label: 8733 Lease of land acquired for park, parkway, or playground purposes
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)873340:72b., .Dec. 22, 1928, ch. 48, § 245 Stat. 1070The words “Administrator of General Services” are substituted for “Director of Public Buildings and Public Parks of the National Capital” [subsequently changed to “Director of the National Park Service” because of section 2 of Executive Order No. 6166 (eff. ) and the Act of (ch. 38, ), and “Public Buildings Administrator” because of sections 301 and 303 of Reorganization Plan No. I of 1939 (eff. , , 1427)] because of section 103(a) of the Federal Property and Administrative Services Act of 1949 (ch. 288, ), which is restated as section 303(c) [303(b)] of the revised title. The words “National Capital Planning Commission” are substituted for “National Capital Park and Planning Commission” because of (ch. 270), as added by (ch. 949, ). See section 8711(f) of the revised title.June 10, 1933March 2, 1934July 1, 193948 Stat. 38953 Stat. 142663 Stat. 380section 9 of the Act of June 6, 1924section 1 of the Act of July 19, 195266 Stat. 790

children.text: subject to the approval of the National Capital Planning Commission;
subject to the need for the immediate use of the land, building, or structure in other ways by the public; and
